text.title: Champion Challenger Pattern for RAG Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all three prereqs satisfied (≥ 1K qps/day, shadow infra, eval rubric)?

conclusion.verdict: defer; resolve missing prereq first (volume too low → wait; no shadow infra → build; no rubric → ai-feature-eval-set-design)

branch.question: After 7 days: delta ≥ 3pp AND n ≥ 1000 AND no safety regressions?

conclusion.verdict: promote challenger; keep previous champion warm 24h with auto-rollback wired
design a stronger challenger (bigger delta); start new cycle
extend cycle 1 more week OR widen shadow ratio if infra allows
reject challenger; investigate safety failure; bench a different change

text.example: prereqs=true → q-cycle-result: delta=+4pp, n=1300, safety=0 → promotion_passes; promote challenger; 24h auto-rollback watch.
